vulnerability_info.Message: Deprecated: Poly1305 as implemented by this package is a cryptographic building block that is not safe for general purpose use. For encryption, use the full ChaCha20-Poly1305 construction implemented by golang.org/x/crypto/chacha20poly1305. For authentication, use a general purpose MAC such as HMAC implemented by crypto/hmac.
